//: Tests run under Node (node --test), not React Native, so they need Node types and .ts-extension imports. Kept separate so the app's typecheck stays RN-only.
//exclude: the base tsconfig excludes 'tests' (so the app check skips them); that exclude is inherited here and would leave this config with no inputs, so clear it
//include: the test files; tsc follows their imports into the pure utils/ modules under test
